UpdateStageName: SteamCMD - Source 2007 Dedicated Server (App 310, Windows depot)
Download gesource mod archive from custom URL
Extract gesource mod archive from custom URL

UpdateSourceData:
#!/bin/bash
# Auto-fetch GoldenEye: Source server package from ModDB and install the gesource mod.
set -uo pipefail
UA="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) Firefox/123.0"
ID="{{ModDBDownloadID}}"
WANT_SHA="{{ModDBSHA256}}"
BASE="{{$FullBaseDir}}"
START="https://www.moddb.com/downloads/start/$ID"
ARC="${BASE}ges_dl.7z"

echo "[GES] Resolving ModDB mirror for download $ID"
MIRROR=$(wget -qO- --user-agent="$UA" "$START" | grep -oE "/downloads/mirror/$ID/[0-9]+/[0-9a-f]+" | head -1)
if [ -z "$MIRROR" ]; then
  echo "[GES] ERROR: no mirror link found on ModDB (layout changed or wrong download ID)"; exit 1
fi

echo "[GES] Downloading https://www.moddb.com$MIRROR"
wget -q --user-agent="$UA" --referer="$START" -O "$ARC" "https://www.moddb.com$MIRROR" || { echo "[GES] ERROR: download failed"; exit 1; }
SZ=$(stat -c%s "$ARC" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
echo "[GES] Downloaded $SZ bytes"
if [ "$SZ" -lt 100000000 ]; then echo "[GES] ERROR: archive too small ($SZ bytes), aborting"; rm -f "$ARC"; exit 1; fi

# Optional integrity check: only runs if a SHA256 is configured
if [ -n "$WANT_SHA" ]; then
  echo "[GES] Verifying SHA256"
  GOT_SHA=$(sha256sum "$ARC" | awk '{print $1}')
  WANT_SHA_LC=$(printf '%s' "$WANT_SHA" | tr 'A-Z' 'a-z' | tr -d '[:space:]')
  if [ "$GOT_SHA" != "$WANT_SHA_LC" ]; then
    echo "[GES] ERROR: SHA256 mismatch"
    echo "[GES]   expected: $WANT_SHA_LC"
    echo "[GES]   actual:   $GOT_SHA"
    rm -f "$ARC"; exit 1
  fi
  echo "[GES] SHA256 verified OK"
else
  echo "[GES] No SHA256 configured, skipping integrity check"
fi

SEVENZIP=""
for c in 7z 7za 7zz 7zr; do
  if command -v "$c" >/dev/null 2>&1; then SEVENZIP="$c"; break; fi
done
cd "$BASE" || exit 1
if [ -n "$SEVENZIP" ]; then
  echo "[GES] Extracting with $SEVENZIP"
  "$SEVENZIP" x -y "$ARC" >/dev/null || { echo "[GES] ERROR: 7z extract failed"; exit 1; }
elif command -v bsdtar >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "[GES] Extracting with bsdtar"
  bsdtar -xf "$ARC" || { echo "[GES] ERROR: bsdtar extract failed"; exit 1; }
else
  echo "[GES] ERROR: no 7z extractor available. Add p7zip-full to the container packages."; exit 1
fi

# Verified layout: the v5.0.6 archive has gesource/ at its root, so it extracts to ${BASE}gesource.
# Fallback relocation in case a future build nests it.
if [ ! -d "${BASE}gesource" ]; then
  FOUND=$(find "$BASE" -maxdepth 4 -type d -name gesource 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  if [ -n "$FOUND" ]; then echo "[GES] Relocating $FOUND -> ${BASE}gesource"; cp -rf "$FOUND" "$BASE"; fi
fi
rm -f "$ARC"

if [ -d "${BASE}gesource" ]; then
  echo "[GES] gesource installed successfully"
else
  echo "[GES] ERROR: gesource folder not present after extraction"; exit 1
fi

UpdateStageName: Fetch and extract gesource from ModDB (.7z)
Create amp_user.cfg if missing (preserved across updates)
